name: HopLedger Backend
description: REST API backend for HopLedger — a micro-brewery inventory and accounting app. Manages brewers, beers, containers, locations and a shared ledger.
author: HAERTIBRAEU

form_fields.label: API Key
form_fields.hint: Secret key the Android app sends in the x-api-key header. Leave empty to disable authentication (not recommended in production).

form_fields.label: Show Locations in public inventory
form_fields.hint: When enabled, the public /api/public/inventory endpoint includes location names.

form_fields.label: WebDAV URL (optional)
form_fields.hint: If set, a daily backup of the database is pushed to this WebDAV server at 02:00.
